description:
Goal
Move native-lowered IR, planned program, and ABI facts onto the clarified data model, then sweep callers/tests/docs onto the new vocabulary.

Signal
- World owns explicit linked-program and native-program stage values.
- Codegen consumes those values without raw tuple seams.
- Docs and tests describe the clarified stages consistently.
title: Data model: migrate native/codegen world state and docs
